module.name: src
module.purpose: Second-generation Rust source organized into client, agent, and common modules with resolved typed configuration, chat message drafts, concrete session/task endpoint drafts, and model request backend implementation.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client-facing draft split into CLI and concrete core client session/task endpoints.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent engine module, frontdoor session/task endpoints, public model request interface, Deepseek backend implementation, and future retrieval/tool interfaces.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared interfaces used across the second-generation source tree, including typed TOML configuration, chat user messages, and shared channel errors.
